criteria.allBoxes: grade A/B AND positive 12-1 momentum AND the filing cross-check passes
criteria.watch: grade C kept as a watch-later tier; tags flag the upside angle (borderline / techEdge / deepValue / highGrowth)
criteria.lowtier: grade D/F — WEAK/POOR fundamentals, surfaced for TRANSPARENCY (the whole graded ladder is visible), NEVER as buy candidates
